data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'Optional direct-download vs email-delivery policy', which is mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no concrete evidence or API interaction provided that confirms this requirement is implemented or satisfied. The absence of any evidence supporting the existence or functionality of this policy indicates a clear gap in requirement coverage.
gaps: No evidence of the optional direct-download vs email-delivery policy being implemented or validated.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify the optional delivery policy.
